questions.question: Explain the primary differences between inter-process communication (IPC) and inter-thread communication. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Clarify the concepts and provide a concrete example

questions.question: Describe the synchronization mechanisms available in multi-threaded programming for ensuring data consistency and preventing data corruption. Choose one synchronization technique and explain its working.
questions.hint: Focus on the concept and its implementation

questions.question: What is the role of semaphores in inter-process communication? Provide an example of a semaphore-based solution to a multi-threaded problem.
questions.hint: Explain the concept and provide a concrete example
